title: Stage 4 Marine Protected Areas Interactive Maps
body: "MMO have developed interactive WebApps to support its assessment of Stage 4 MPAs, help stakeholders understand potential management options and share their views.   Stage 4 UK Fishing Effort under 12m, Static Gear (2016 to 2022) Stage 4 UK Fishing Effort under 12m, Bottom Towed Gear (2016 to 2022) Stage 4 UK Fishing Effort under 12m, Midwater Gear (2016 to 2022) Stage 4 VMS Fishing Density, Static Gear (2016 to 2022) Stage 4 VMS Fishing Density, Bottom Towed Gear (2016 to 2022) Stage 4 VMS Fishing Density, Midwater Gear (2016 to 2022)  "
